mapper.select: SELECT PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS propertyGroupId, PROPERTY_ID AS propertyId, PROPERTY_NAME AS propertyName, PROPERTY_DESC AS propertyDesc, DATA_TYPE AS dataType, VALID_DATA AS validData, DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_PROPERTY WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} ORDER BY PROPERTY_ID

SELECT VERSION AS version, REASON AS reason, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM ( SELECT VERSION, REASON, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY VERSION ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC) AS RN FROM FWK_PROPERTY_HISTORY WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} ) WHERE RN = 1 ORDER BY VERSION DESC

SELECT PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS propertyGroupId, PROPERTY_ID AS propertyId, VERSION AS version, PROPERTY_NAME AS propertyName, PROPERTY_DESC AS propertyDesc, DATA_TYPE AS dataType, VALID_DATA AS validData, DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, REASON AS reason, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_PROPERTY_HISTORY WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} AND VERSION = #{version} ORDER BY PROPERTY_ID
